assertions.assertion: Output contains a call to builder.Services.AddIdentityServer with an options lambda
Output enables all four event types: RaiseErrorEvents, RaiseInformationEvents, RaiseFailureEvents, RaiseSuccessEvents all set to true
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 1 and Pattern 8 show all four events enabled.

assertions.assertion: Output calls AddInMemoryIdentityResources with at least IdentityResources.OpenId() and IdentityResources.Profile()
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 1 shows .AddInMemoryIdentityResources and Pattern 3 shows OpenId() and Profile().

assertions.assertion: Output calls AddInMemoryApiScopes with a scope named 'weatherapi'
Output calls app.UseIdentityServer() and does NOT separately call app.UseAuthentication()
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 1 shows app.UseIdentityServer() and notes it 'Includes UseAuthentication()'.
